characters.name: Bean Bats
characters.description: Bean BatsProduction InformationOnly episode"The Legend of the Shadow Bean!"InformationSpeciesBean Bats Bean Batsare creatures who live in theCave of the Bean Bats. They made their debut in the episode "The Legend of the Shadow Bean!" and never appeared in any subsequent episode. At first in the episode they despised of the light, only being able to roam free after obtaining the shadow bean. Then, after Butterbean and her team managed to bring back the light, they realized the light was good, also revealing that Queen Batilda was able to withstand the light all along without special sunglasses. It is unknown if the other Bean Bats express these qualities, though they were fine with the light having their sunglasses on.

characters.name: Butterbean
characters.description: ButterbeanShow DesignBook DesignVoice ActorMargaret Ying Drake(US)Lily Wilmott(UK)InformationGenderFemale ♀PronounShe/Her/HersSpeciesFairyAge12Eye ColorDark BlueHair ColorBrownComplexionApricotRelativesCricket(little sister)PersonalityHard working, responsible, caring, organizedOccupationChefLikePlaying with her little sisterCricket; Playing with her fairy friends; Interacting and greeting Brookies and café customersDislikeSeeing friends sad; not getting to play with CricketFriendPoppy,Dazzle,JasperandCassidyEnemyMs. Marmalady,SporkandSpatchandOopsie DoodleButterbeanis the titular character ofthis wiki topicand owner ofher very own café; a fairy kind and talented chef who creatively comes up with brand new dishes. She isCricket's older sister and the leader ofThe Bean Team. She is voiced byMargaret Ying Drakein the US version and Lily Wilmott in the UK version. Lily Wilmott(UK) Butterbean is a talented chef and is described asthe "fairy best boss"by her friends. She is kind and sweet; always willing to lend a hand and enjoys coming up with brand new fun and colorful recipes. She enjoys playing with her fairy friends and often plays with her sister,Cricket, to make up for the time they spend working. She is never angry, although, she did get mad atCricketonce for her messed up dress in "Cricket the Flower Girl" but was quick to forgive her. She is also very quick to forgiveMs. Marmalady'sactions.

Like most cats, Cookie is cute, soft, and very playful, but can also be easily overwhelmed when something frightens her or if someone isn’t gentle with her, which is seen in "Where's Cookie?." characters.name: Cricket
characters.description: CricketShow DesignBook DesignVoice ActorGabriella Pizzolo(US)Amelie Halls(UK)InformationGenderFemale ♀PronounShe/Her/HersSpeciesFairyAge6-year-oldEye ColorAqua-BlueHair Coloryellowish-blondeComplexionApricotRelativesButterbean(big sister)Cookie(Cat)PersonalitySpunky, Curious, Sweet, EmpatheticLikePlaying with her sisterButterbean; Playing with other friends; Playing withCookie; Drawing.DislikeSeeingDottiesad; Seeing fairy friends sadFriendDottie,Poppy,Dazzle,Jasper,RebelandCassidyEnemyMs. Marmalady,SporkandSpatchandOopsie DoodleCricketisButterbean's little sister, a main character in the series, and is part ofThe Bean Team. She is voiced by Gabriella Pizzolo. Amelie Halls(UK) Cricket, the creative and talented member of the Bean Team, wields her magic wand with finesse and precision, but it's not a wand in the traditional sense; it's an icing bag. With it, she performs her culinary magic, transforming plain cakes and pastries into works of art. Cricket is passionate about her craft and enjoys lending a hand to her team members, helping them finish their work with her artistic touch. Whether it's piping intricate designs or adding finishing touches, Cricket's skills with the icing bag are second to none. She takes immense pride in her work and never fails to impress with her creations.

Whether it's piping intricate designs or adding finishing touches, Cricket's skills with the icing bag are second to none. characters.name: Cutie Pie
characters.description: Cutie PieInformationGenderFemale ♀PronounShe/Her/HersSpeciesVehicleEye ColorYellowCutie Pie is a small pizza-pie truck, acquired byCricketin the episode "Cutie Pie's Pizza Pies!." She is brought to life with love, care, and magic fromCricketandThe Bean Team. Cutie Pie is essentially a smaller version of theSweet Ride, with eyes and a mouth. Much of the vehicle's exterior is a blue glittery color, with solid pink borders and outlines. Cutie Pie's roof is colored yellow, as with her mouth. Her eye colors are yellow. The window, where orders are taken, is striped pink and yellow, when closed. Cutie Pie has a sweet personality. She bonds withCricketand is able to replicateCricket'semotions and feelings well. They get along very well, and do things together, as a result. She is very loving to everyone she greets.
characters.personality_section: Cutie Pie has a sweet personality. She bonds withCricketand is able to replicateCricket'semotions and feelings well. They get along very well, and do things together, as a result. She is very loving to everyone she greets.

characters.name: Madame President
characters.description: Madame PresidentProduction InformationOnly episode"A Grilled Cheese for the Big Cheese!"InformationGenderFemale ♀SpeciesBrookieMadame President, or "The President" is the president of Puddlebrook. She governs the day-to-day operations of Puddlebrook. TBD TBD TBD

characters.name: Martha Marmalady
characters.description: Martha MarmaladyInformationGenderFemale ♀PronounShe/her/hersSpeciesFairyHair ColorBrownLikeMs. MarmaladyMartha Marmaladyis the sister ofMs. Marmalady. She was first seen in  the episode "The Marmalady Sisters!" and seen again in "A Baby at Marmalady's!" Martha has brown hair and dark-pink cookie wings. She wears a red jacket, red hair scrunchy, and her apron has light-pink stripes. Martha has a rude demeanor to her personality. She often argues and fights for things to go her way. Her anger builds as her wishes continue to be unfulfilled, to the point that she reaches her top and breaks out in anger. (In the case of "The Marmalady Sisters!" she is seen walking away and vowing to never talk to Ms. Marmalady again after they destroyed their cake by fighting.
